title: commit-check
description:
Configuration for commit-check, a commit message, branch naming, and push linter
https://github.com/commit-check/commit-check

inherit_from.description:
Inherit configuration from a parent file. Supports github: shorthand (e.g., github:owner/repo:path/to/cchk.toml), HTTPS URL, or local file path.
https://github.com/commit-check/commit-check/blob/main/docs/configuration.rst#organization-level-configuration-inherit_from

message_pattern.description: Custom regex pattern for commit message validation. When set (non-empty), this replaces the auto-generated Conventional Commits regex entirely. Useful for enforcing custom formats such as JIRA smart commits (e.g., ^PROJ-\\d+: .+).

subject_capitalized.description: Subject must start with a capital letter.

subject_imperative.description:
Subject must be in imperative mood.
https://github.com/commit-check/commit-check/blob/main/commit_check/imperatives.py

subject_max_length.description: Maximum length of the subject line. No limit by default.

subject_min_length.description: Minimum length of the subject line. No limit by default.

allow_commit_types.description: Allowed commit types when conventional_commits is true.

require_body.description: Require a body in the commit message.

require_signed_off_by.description: Require Signed-off-by line in the commit message footer.

ignore_authors.description: List of commit authors or co-authors (Co-authored-by: lines) to bypass all commit checks. Useful for bots (e.g., dependabot[bot], coderabbitai[bot]).

branch.title: Branch rules
branch.description:
Settings for branch naming validation.
https://conventional-branch.github.io/

allow_branch_types.description: Allowed branch types when conventional_branch is true.

allow_branch_names.description: Additional standalone branch names allowed when conventional_branch is true (e.g., ["develop", "staging"]). By default, master, main, HEAD, and PR-* are always allowed.

require_rebase_target.description: Target branch for rebase requirement. If not set, no rebase validation is performed.

ignore_authors.description: List of authors to bypass branch checks.

allow_force_push.description: Allow force pushes. Set to false to block force pushes when used as a pre-push hook or with --no-force-push.
